args.query:
SELECT a."ShippingState" AS state, AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate))/86400.0) AS avg_close_days
FROM "Case" c
JOIN core_crm.Account a ON REPLACE(c.accountid, '#', '') = REPLACE(a.Id, '#', '')
WHERE c.createddate >= (DATE '2022-10-26' - INTERVAL '18 months')
  AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY a."ShippingState"
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 10
ORDER BY avg_close_days ASC
LIMIT 1;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT a."ShippingState" AS state, AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate))/86400.0) AS avg_close_days
FROM "Case" c
JOIN core_crm.Account a ON REPLACE(c.accountid, '#', '') = REPLACE(a.Id, '#', '')
WHERE c.createddate >= (DATE '2022-10-26' - INTERVAL '18 months')
  AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY a."ShippingState"
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 10
ORDER BY avg_close_days ASC
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
SELECT c.accountid, AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate))/86400.0) AS avg_close_days
FROM "Case" c
WHERE c.createddate >= (DATE '2022-10-26' - INTERVAL '18 months')
  AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.accountid;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT c.accountid, AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (c.closeddate - c.createddate))/86400.0) AS avg_close_days
FROM "Case" c
WHERE c.createddate >= (DATE '2022-10-26' - INTERVAL '18 months')
  AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.accountid;

args.query:
SELECT c.accountid, AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((c.closeddate::timestamp) - (c.createddate::timestamp)))/86400.0) AS avg_close_days
FROM "Case" c
WHERE c.createddate::date >= (DATE '2022-10-26' - INTERVAL '18 months')
  AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.accountid
ORDER BY avg_close_days ASC
LIMIT 10;

exec_args.sql:
SELECT c.accountid, AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM ((c.closeddate::timestamp) - (c.createddate::timestamp)))/86400.0) AS avg_close_days
FROM "Case" c
WHERE c.createddate::date >= (DATE '2022-10-26' - INTERVAL '18 months')
  AND c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.accountid
ORDER BY avg_close_days ASC
LIMIT 10;
